# American Barber Institute (ABI)
> New York's only dedicated barber school, est. 1996. NYS-licensed (NYSED/BPSS) 500-hour Master Barber program at two campuses: 48 West 39th Street, Manhattan (212-290-2289) and 121 Westchester Square, Bronx (718-676-0640). Tuition from $4,600 with weekly payment plans; ACCES-VR, Post-9/11 GI Bill(R) and VA benefits accepted. New classes start the first Monday of every month. English and Spanish instruction.

## Programs
- [500-Hour Master Barber Program (Manhattan)](https://www.abi.edu/programs/500-hour-master-barber): ~4 months full-time, NY State Board Exam prep, job placement
- [500-Hour Master Barber Program (Bronx)](https://www.abi.edu/programs/500-hour-master-barber-bronx): ~4 months full-time, NY State Board Exam prep, job placement
- [50-Hour Barber Refresher](https://www.abi.edu/programs/50-hour-barber-refresher) (Manhattan)
- [3-Hour Contagious Diseases Course](https://www.abi.edu/programs/contagious-diseases) (Manhattan & Bronx)

## Landing pages (enrollment funnels)
- [500-Hour Master Barber — Manhattan, English](https://www.abi.edu/500-hours-master-barber-program-landing-page)
- [500-Hour Master Barber — Manhattan, Spanish](https://www.abi.edu/500-hours-master-barber-program-landing-page/spanish)
- [500-Hour Master Barber — Bronx, English](https://www.abi.edu/master-barber-program-bronx)
- [500-Hour Master Barber — Bronx, Spanish](https://www.abi.edu/master-barber-program-bronx/spanish)

## Key facts
- New York requires 500 training hours for the Master Barber license
- Full-time: 30 hrs/week for 17 weeks; weekends: 18 hrs/week for 27 weeks
- Requirements: HSD/GED or pass ABI's ATB entrance exam; minimum age 17
- Hands-on training in a supervised on-campus barber clinic with real clients from week one
- Job placement assistance on graduation

## Funding & financial aid
- Weekly payment plans from $150
- ACCES-VR funding (qualified NYS residents with disabilities) — covers tuition, tools, books
- Post-9/11 GI Bill(R) and VA benefits accepted
- NYS Department of Labor grants may apply

## Campuses
- Manhattan: 48 West 39th Street — (212) 290-2289 (EN), (212) 290-0278 (ES)
- Bronx: 121 Westchester Square — (718) 676-0640

## Contact
- General: admission@abi.edu
- Hours: Mon-Sun 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM
- FAQs: https://www.abi.edu/faq
- Schedules: https://www.abi.edu/schedules
- Contact form: https://www.abi.edu/contact
